Bash(mysql -uroot -e "CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS auth_server DEFAULT CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci;")

Bash(C:/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe -uroot auth_server -e "ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN sms_2fa_enabled TINYINT\(1\) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 AFTER mfa_secret, ADD COLUMN sms_2fa_enabled_at TIMESTAMP NULL DEFAULT NULL AFTER sms_2fa_enabled;")
Bash(C:/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe -uroot auth_server -e "SHOW COLUMNS FROM users LIKE 'sms_2fa%';")
Bash(C:/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe -uroot auth_server -e "SELECT id, name, revoked FROM oauth_clients;")

Bash(C:/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe -uroot auth_server -e "ALTER TABLE oauth_clients ADD COLUMN slug VARCHAR\(64\) NULL UNIQUE AFTER name, ADD COLUMN display_name_ar VARCHAR\(255\) NULL AFTER slug, ADD COLUMN display_name_en VARCHAR\(255\) NULL AFTER display_name_ar, ADD COLUMN description TEXT NULL AFTER display_name_en, ADD COLUMN color VARCHAR\(16\) NULL AFTER description, ADD COLUMN launch_url VARCHAR\(500\) NULL AFTER color, ADD COLUMN logo_url VARCHAR\(500\) NULL AFTER launch_url, ADD COLUMN is_first_party TINYINT\(1\) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 AFTER logo_url, ADD COLUMN deleted_at TIMESTAMP NULL DEFAULT NULL;")
Bash(C:/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe -uroot auth_server -e "SHOW COLUMNS FROM oauth_clients LIKE '%logout%';")

Bash(C:/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe -uroot auth_server -e "SELECT \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM users\) AS users, \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM oauth_clients\) AS clients, \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM settings\) AS settings, \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM roles\) AS roles, \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM model_has_roles\) AS assignments;")
Bash(C:/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe -uroot auth_server -e "SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS total, SUM\(source='hr_master'\) AS hr FROM users;")

Bash(C:/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe -uroot auth_server -e "SELECT full_name, email, national_id, phone, employee_number, needs_id_linking, governorate FROM users WHERE source='hr_master' ORDER BY employee_number LIMIT 8;")

Bash(C:/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe -uroot auth_server -e "SELECT event_type, COUNT\(*\) FROM audit_logs WHERE event_type IN \('account_locked','account_locked_by_admin','account_unlocked_by_admin','password_reuse_blocked','backchannel_logout_failed','password_reset_completed','consent_denied'\) GROUP BY event_type;")
Bash(C:/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe -uroot auth_server -e "SELECT event_type, COUNT\(*\) AS cnt FROM audit_logs GROUP BY event_type ORDER BY cnt DESC;")
